title: Biosimilars reshape immunology care across EU a decade after market entry [Advocacy Lab]
summary_full: Ten years after the first etanercept biosimilar entered the European market, biosimilars have helped expand access to biologic therapies for millions of patients
summary_public: Ten years after the first etanercept biosimilar entered the European market, biosimilars have helped expand access to biologic therapies for millions of patients
